html:
Exclusive to:
Kitschy Idols are character-specific items that only Woodie is able to craft in the Magic Filter and Survivor Items Filter. Woodie can then eat them to trigger specific transformations. When eaten, they cost 20 and 15 , and restore 18.75 , the same as raw Monster Meat.

Contents

  • 1 Kitschy Beaver Idol
  • 2 Kitschy Moose Idol
  • 3 Kitschy Goose Idol
  • 4 Trivia
  • 5 Gallery

Kitschy Beaver Idol

The Kitschy Beaver Idol requires three Monster Meats and two Logs to craft. When Woodie eats it, he transforms into the Werebeaver.

Kitschy Moose Idol

The Kitschy Moose Idol requires three Monster Meats and two Cut Grass to craft. After eating it, Woodie transforms into the Weremoose.

Kitschy Goose Idol

The Kitschy Goose Idol requires three Monster Meats and three seeds to craft. When Woodie eats it, he transforms into the Weregoose.

Trivia

  • The Kitschy Idols were introduced in the Woodie Character Update.
  • Spoilage was removed in the March 2022 QoL update.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Kitschy Idols from Rhymes With Play #255.
  • Final art of the Kitschy Idols from Rhymes With Play #255.
Craftable ItemsFood

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Kitschy Idols are character-specific items that only Woodie is able to craft in the Magic Filter and Survivor Items Filter. Woodie can then eat them to trigger specific transformations. When eaten, they cost 20 and 15 , and restore 18.75 , the same as raw Monster Meat.
Contents
1 Kitschy Beaver Idol
2 Kitschy Moose Idol
3 Kitschy Goose Idol
4 Trivia
5 Gallery
Kitschy Beaver Idol[edit | edit source]
Kitschy Beaver Idol
"Invokes the curse of the Werebeaver."
Food Info
18.75
-20
-15
Meat
Object Info
Perk
Transforms Woodie into a Werebeaver.
Doesn't spoil
Can be Burned
10
Crafting
×3 ×2 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"wereitem_beaver"
“I guess science works differently up North.”
–Wilson, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“He wouldn't mind if I use this for kindling, right?”
–Willow, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“Beard is making crafts?”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“A small wooden reminder of Woodie's cursed existence.”
–Wendy, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“TURNS THE HAIRY FLESHSACK INTO AN EVEN HAIRIER FLESHSACK”
–WX-78, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“It appears to induce a Castorthropic state.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“Think I'm finally getting the hang of this, eh Lucy?”
–Woodie, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“It seems he's learning to bend the curse to his will.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“Is this meant tö summön yöur fylgja?”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“It looks just like you, Mr. Woodie!”
–Webber, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“You're mastering this curse business, mon ami!”
–Warly, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“Friend Eater!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“Huh. The craftsmanship ain't half bad.”
–Winona, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“I do love a cursed trinket!”
–Wortox, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“There something spilling out its belly.”
–Wurt, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“I knew the Werebeaver was real! Nobody believed me!”
–Walter, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
“Ooooh, what a fun little trinket!”
–Wanda, when examining a Kitschy Beaver Idol.
The Kitschy Beaver Idol requires three Monster Meats and two Logs to craft. When Woodie eats it, he transforms into the Werebeaver.
Kitschy Moose Idol[edit | edit source]
Kitschy Moose Idol
"Invokes the curse of the Weremoose."
Food Info
18.75
-20
-15
Meat
Object Info
Perk
Transforms Woodie into a Weremoose.
Doesn't spoil
Can be Burned
10
Crafting
×3 ×2 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"wereitem_moose"
“A perfectly normal cursed moose thing.”
–Wilson, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Yup, looks cursed alright.”
–Willow, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“This make beardman mighty like Wolfgang?”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“I don't want to play with that.”
–Wendy, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“CONSUME IT AND BE STRONG, MY MINION”
–WX-78, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Someone's going to trip on this, dear.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Not bad, if I do say so mooself.”
–Woodie, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Almost as powerful as it is tacky.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“It represents a warriör's spirit!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Can you make a toy without meat in it?”
–Webber, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Excusez-moi, but why does this smell like meat?”
–Warly, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Small Branch Head.”
–Wormwood, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“I ain't one for er... decorations.”
–Winona, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Weremoose? There moose!”
–Wortox, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“Wicker-lady say should eat with mouth closed.”
–Wurt, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“So how does the curse work? When did it start?”
–Walter, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
“I love a good magical knickknack.”
–Wanda, when examining a Kitschy Moose Idol.
The Kitschy Moose Idol requires three Monster Meats and two Cut Grass to craft. After eating it, Woodie transforms into the Weremoose.
Kitschy Goose Idol[edit | edit source]
Kitschy Goose Idol
"Invokes the curse of the Weregoose."
Food Info
18.75
-20
-15
Meat
Object Info
Perk
Transforms Woodie into a Weregoose.
Doesn't spoil
Can be Burned
10
Crafting
×3 ×3 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Always available
Miscellaneous
"wereitem_goose"
“That thing's giving ME goosebumps!”
–Wilson, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Burn it. BURN. IT.”
–Willow, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Wolfgang getting a bit worried about beardy friend...”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“That is deeply disturbing.”
–Wendy, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“IT'S UGLY”
–WX-78, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“An... artistic representation of the Branta canadensis.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“If you can't beat 'em, join 'em.”
–Woodie, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Ugh, it offends my eyes.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“It's... er... very fearsöme!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Mr. Woodie, are you alright?”
–Webber, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Well... that certainly is... something.”
–Warly, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Tweeter?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Does he hafta leave these creepy things lyin' around?”
–Winona, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Let loose the goose!”
–Wortox, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Wanna play with doll!”
–Wurt, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“Yeah that... definitely looks cursed.”
–Walter, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
“That lumberjack's an odd duck, isn't he?”
–Wanda, when examining a Kitschy Goose Idol.
The Kitschy Goose Idol requires three Monster Meats and three seeds to craft. When Woodie eats it, he transforms into the Weregoose.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Kitschy Idols were introduced in the Woodie Character Update.
Spoilage was removed in the March 2022 QoL update.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Concept art of the Kitschy Idols from Rhymes With Play #255.
Final art of the Kitschy Idols from Rhymes With Play #255.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thần tượng Kitschy là những vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật mà chỉ Woodie mới có thể chế tạo trong Bộ lọc ma thuật và Bộ lọc vật phẩm sống sót. Woodie sau đó có thể ăn chúng để kích hoạt các biến đổi cụ thể. Khi ăn, chúng có giá 20 và 15 và hồi lại 18,75, giống như Thịt Quái sống.
title: Kitschy Idols
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
'''Kitschy Idols''' are character-specific items that only [[Woodie]] is able to craft in the [[Magic Filter]] and [[Survivor Items Filter]]. Woodie can then eat them to trigger specific transformations. When eaten, they cost 20 {{Hp}} and 15 {{Sanity}}, and restore 18.75 {{Hunger}}, the same as raw [[Monster Meat]].

==Kitschy Beaver Idol==

|multiplier1 = 3
|ingredient2 = Log
|multiplier2 = 2 ({{Pic24|Woodie Portrait|Woodie}} only)

|hungerRestored = 18.75
|sanityRestored = -15
|spoil = Doesn't spoil

The '''Kitschy Beaver Idol''' requires three [[Monster Meat]]s and two [[Log]]s to craft. When Woodie eats it, he transforms into the [[Woodie/Cursed|Werebeaver]].
